steps.expected: Registration form shows username, email, password, confirm password, and submit
steps.observed: All four inputs plus 'Create account' button were visible

evidence.network: GET /register document requests observed in browser

assertions.title: Valid registration creates user and logs in

steps.expected: User created and redirected to authenticated page
steps.observed: User reg404_u1773896608 registered and redirected to http://localhost:3101/admin

steps.expected: Session cookie set; DB user row has user_group=2 and bcrypt cost 12 hash
steps.observed: Browser cookie contained session token; SQL check showed user_group=2 and hash prefix $2b$12$

steps.action: Submit registration using existing username reg404_u1773896608 and a new email
steps.expected: Validation error for duplicate username; no new account
steps.observed: UI showed 'Username already in use' with validation failure; SQL check confirmed no row created for duplicate-attempt email

steps.action: Submit registration using new username and existing email reg404_u1773896608@example.com
steps.expected: Validation error for duplicate email; no new account
steps.observed: UI showed 'Email already in use' with validation failure; SQL check confirmed no row created for duplicate-attempt username

steps.action: Submit registration with non-matching password and confirmation
steps.expected: Password mismatch validation error and no account creation
steps.observed: UI showed 'Passwords do not match' and stayed on /register

evidence.network: No /api/auth/register request captured at mismatch validation step

steps.expected: Distinct required-field errors for username, email, password, and confirmation
steps.observed: Displayed 'Username is required', 'Email is required', 'Password is required', and 'Please confirm your password'

evidence.network: No /api/auth/register request captured before client-side required-field errors

steps.observed: UI showed 'Please enter a valid email address'

evidence.network: No /api/auth/register request captured at invalid-email client validation step

steps.expected: Visible registration link present on login page

assertions.title: Unknown routes show 404

steps.observed: Friendly in-app 404 content rendered in UI, but HTTP response from curl was 200 OK

steps.action: Verify unknown route status via curl

evidence.network: GET /reg404_missing_1773896608 observed in browser; curl evidence shows HTTP 200

assertions.issues: Fails contract pass criteria requiring HTTP 404 status on unknown routes.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request output did not include response status codes/payload bodies (request metadata only).
frictions.resolution: Used UI text assertions plus curl/SQL corroboration for assertions that required explicit HTTP/DB evidence.

summary: Tested 9 assertions (VAL-REG-001..008, VAL-PUBLIC-002): 8 passed, 1 failed. Failure: VAL-PUBLIC-002 because unknown route returns friendly 404 UI but HTTP status 200 instead of 404.
